raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "A KUNGA KUNGA
Gars irr us manni/ ta-
velz ka tas KUNGS
manni fwaidtig irr: Wiꞥſch irr
manni fuhtig teem Apbehdi-
teen Preeku fluddinaht/ tafs
fagranstas Sirdis apfeet/ teem
Zeetuma Landim fluddinaht At-
fwabbinaschann/ un teem Sai-
ſiteem pilnigu Atraifischann.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Weenu Gaddu ta labba
Prahta ta KUNGA fluddinaht/
un to Deenu tahs Atreepſchanas
muha Deerwa/ wiꞥſus Noskum-
muschus eepreezinaht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Teem Apbehdinateem eeſſch
Zianas doht/ teem dahwanacht
Glihtumu Pelnu Weetâ/ Pree-
zibas-Etji Noskumschanas Wee-
tâ/ skaistas Drehbes skummiga
Prahta Weetâ/ ka tee nosaukti
tohp stipri Rohki tahs Taifnibas/
Eedehsti ta KUNGA/ ka wiꞥſch
tohp pagohdinahte.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tee ustaifihg tahs wez-
zas pohstu Weetas/ un uzels/
kas zittkahrt pohstihts tappis/
un atjaungahs tohs nopohstitus
Pilstahtus/ kas preeſſch Zilschu
Ziltim jaw pohstâ bijufchi.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un Sweschineeki stahwehs
un gannihs juhtus fihkus Loh-
pus/ un fiveſcht Behrni buhs
juhti Arraji/ un juhtu Wihna-
Dahrsneeki.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Bet juhs tapfeet Preesteri
ta KUNGA nosaukti/ juhs tap-
feet Kalpi muhtu Deerwa deh-
weti. Juhs ehdiſeet to Pagano
"
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Juhsin Apkauneſcha
Weeta (dabbufeet juhs) di-
kahrtigi/ un tahs Neewascha-
Weetâ tee gawilehs ſawâs �
fâs. Jo tee turrehs fawa Se-
imê weenu diwkahrtigu Jh-
ſchunu/ winkeem buhs muhſi-
ga Lihaſmiba.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Jo es tas KUNGS m-
leju to Teefu/ un eenihſtu
Lauptjunn eeſſch ta Dedsan-
Uppura. Un es darriſchu ka wi-
nu Darbs eeſſch Batretib-
buhs/ un darriſchu ar teem we-
nu muhſchigu Derrihu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un winnu Dſumnum-
taps starp teem Paganeem p-
ſihſtams/ un winno Behr-
Behrni starp teem Landim/ wi-
kas tohs redſehs/ tee pasihs toh-
la tee weens Dſumnums/ ko ta-
KUNGS fwehtijs irr.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Es preezajohs ar lee-
Preeku eeſſch ta KUNGA/ ma-
na Dwebfele lihgsmojahs eeſſ-
manna Deerwa. Jo wiꞥſch ir-
mann apgehrbis ar Drehbeh-
tahs Pestifchanas/ ar teen-
Swahrkeem tahs Taifnibas tr-
wiſsch mann apfedsis/ itt �-
weens Bruhdgans ar Preestex-
Glihtumu isgehrbjahs/ un �-
weena Bruhte ar fawu fkaistu-
Apgehrbu isgresnojahs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Jo ka ta Semme fawus-
Augkus leek isangt/ un ka weens-
Dahrsfawu Gebjumn leek us-
dihgt/ ta liks tas Kungs KUNGS-
Taifs
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
